results.title: SpaceX eyes U.S. mobile market with new Starlink service
results.description: SpaceX (SPCX.O), opens new tab has told investors it plans to launch a Starlink mobile service for U.S. ​consumers, the Financial Times reported on Friday, in ‌a move that could allow the Elon Musk-led company to compete directly with Verizon (VZ.N), opens new tab, AT&T (T.N), opens new tab and T-Mobile (TMUS.O), opens new tab. [...]
